examples.summary: Desktop overview keeps one dominant backlog anomaly and a live intervention workbench.
Queue lens buffers new deltas instead of re-ranking away from the preserved backlog selection.
Dependency lens downgrades visualization parity to table-only posture while preserving the same shell.
Audit investigation keeps preserved proof basis visible and action posture frozen under stale continuity truth.
Incident compare route opens the only allowed three-plane posture and preserves the same anomaly selection.
Resilience health drill keeps essential-function health visible beside restore debt context.

selectedAnomaly.title: Backlog surge in referral confirmation
selectedAnomaly.summary: Referral confirmation wait time is climbing faster than staffed review lanes can drain it.
selectedAnomaly.trustSummary: Authoritative queue tuple is current, but the next relief action is gated by live staffing confirmation.
selectedAnomaly.evidenceBasis: Queue pressure, confirmation dwell, and replay-safe continuity evidence agree on one blocked lane.
selectedAnomaly.continuityQuestion: Which confirmation lane can absorb relief without dropping the currently selected backlog proof basis?
selectedAnomaly.recommendedAction: Shift two confirmation reviewers into the priority repair lane for the next 90 minutes.
selectedAnomaly.blockerSummary: Requires staffing tuple to stay live and release freeze to remain scoped away from queue rebalancing.
selectedAnomaly.compareSummary: Compare queue growth against the preserved 06:00 baseline and the latest delta digest.
selectedAnomaly.healthSummary: Confirmation essential function is degraded but still serviceable if relief lands in the current window.
selectedAnomaly.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch staffing allocation note in governance

anomalyRanking.title: Backlog surge in referral confirmation
anomalyRanking.summary: Referral confirmation wait time is climbing faster than staffed review lanes can drain it.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: Authoritative queue tuple is current, but the next relief action is gated by live staffing confirmation.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Queue pressure, confirmation dwell, and replay-safe continuity evidence agree on one blocked lane.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: Which confirmation lane can absorb relief without dropping the currently selected backlog proof basis?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Shift two confirmation reviewers into the priority repair lane for the next 90 minutes.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: Requires staffing tuple to stay live and release freeze to remain scoped away from queue rebalancing.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Compare queue growth against the preserved 06:00 baseline and the latest delta digest.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Confirmation essential function is degraded but still serviceable if relief lands in the current window.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch staffing allocation note in governance

anomalyRanking.title: Supplier dependency degradation on outbound confirmations
anomalyRanking.summary: Delivery acknowledgements from the outbound supplier are intermittently late, expanding the retry lane.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: Dependency watch tuple is buffered; summary stays truthful but the action plane is guarded until the parity lane settles.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Supplier watch, outbound cache lag, and intervention guardrail tuples still agree on the degradation boundary.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: Can the team reduce user-facing lag without overclaiming a recovered supplier state?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Hold non-essential outbound retries and route only priority confirmations through the protected path.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: Automatic replay remains blocked while supplier ambiguity and cache freshness stay above the bound.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Compare supplier latency drift against the last fully published runtime publication bundle.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Notification delivery function is degraded and must present table-first posture if parity drops further.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch supplier watch memo in governance

anomalyRanking.title: Continuity breakage in evidence replay
anomalyRanking.summary: The replay chain can still show preserved proof, but the newest continuity slice no longer joins cleanly to the active watch tuple.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: Current board symptoms are visible, yet the preserved proof basis is older and must be named before any action posture upgrades.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Continuity evidence slice, replay lineage, and audit tuple disagree on the newest checkpoint only.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: What changed after the preserved proof basis, and does the action plane stay diagnostic-only until that drift is explained?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Freeze promoted action state, open investigation mode, and preserve the current proof basis for compare.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: Intervention is blocked until replay lineage and continuity evidence settle on the same checkpoint hash.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Side-by-side preserved proof vs live delta is required; silent rebasing is forbidden.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Continuity control envelope is blocked for calm posture, but evidence remains readable.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch continuity review package in governance

anomalyRanking.title: Release freeze spillover into manual relief planning
anomalyRanking.summary: The current release freeze is correctly blocking automated relief, but operators still need a bounded manual plan.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: Runtime freeze verdict is authoritative; the workbench must look intentionally frozen, not secretly commit-ready.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Release watch tuple, runtime freeze verdict, and affected service-health rows agree on the freeze boundary.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: What relief options remain lawful while the freeze stays active?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Prepare the manual fallback package and keep every execution step fenced behind governance handoff.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: All automated relief remains blocked until freeze verdict clears or governance opens an exception lane.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Compare frozen release posture against the last pre-freeze admissible action set.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Affected essential functions are guarded, not healthy, even where customer impact is currently low.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch release-freeze exception stub

anomalyRanking.title: Confirmation drift between assurance slice and board summary
anomalyRanking.summary: Assurance confirms the current mitigation outcome, but the board summary is still carrying an older watch explanation.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: Publication parity is exact enough for read-only review, but board calmness cannot upgrade until the slice rebinding lands.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Assurance slice, board summary, and release publication agree on the mitigation result but not the visible narrative.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: Which surface needs rebinding so the operator can trust one settled explanation again?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Re-publish the assurance-backed summary bundle and keep intervention posture observe-only meanwhile.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: Summary calmness is suppressed until the board explanation and slice tuple realign.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Compare assurance-backed and board-local narratives instead of the underlying outcome.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Assurance function is stable; only the shell explanation is drifted.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch publication drift note in governance

anomalyRanking.title: Restore debt rising above rehearsal coverage
anomalyRanking.summary: Restore readiness is still serviceable, but rehearsal debt is now wider than the preferred confidence band.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: Operational readiness tuples are current, yet the board must keep mitigation authority modest until coverage improves.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Restore rehearsal outcomes, backup-set manifests, and readiness snapshots agree on the debt window.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: Which recovery tier needs rehearsal before the shell can show more confidence?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Schedule the next bounded restore rehearsal and keep workbench posture observe-only until it settles.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: Recovery control posture suppresses stronger action authority until rehearsal coverage rises.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Compare current readiness against the last green rehearsal tier, not against ideal target state alone.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Recovery posture is guarded but not blocked.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch resilience debt stub

anomalyRanking.title: Supplier ambiguity on partner-origin acknowledgements
anomalyRanking.summary: Partner-origin acknowledgements are inconsistent enough to merit watch posture but not promotion above active blockers.
anomalyRanking.trustSummary: The watch tuple is current and quiet; this stays in low-noise posture until it crosses the promotion fence.
anomalyRanking.evidenceBasis: Partner acknowledgement audit rows and outbound retry summaries both show ambiguity without current breach-risk.
anomalyRanking.continuityQuestion: What would move this watchpoint into a promoted anomaly, and what should stay merely visible?
anomalyRanking.recommendedAction: Keep the watch visible, expand the compare slice only if variance persists through the next observation window.
anomalyRanking.blockerSummary: No manual intervention yet; the lane remains observe-only until variance persists.
anomalyRanking.compareSummary: Compare the partner watchpoint only against the current observation band, not against hard-failure tuples.
anomalyRanking.healthSummary: Supplier cohort remains watch-level and should not dominate the board by default.
anomalyRanking.governanceHandoffLabel: Launch supplier-ambiguity note

northStarBand.label: Priority backlog at risk
northStarBand.interpretation: Backlog grew faster than the protected queue can absorb.

northStarBand.label: Board trust envelope
northStarBand.interpretation: One promoted anomaly is live; three others remain visible but fenced.

northStarBand.label: Operational readiness drift
northStarBand.interpretation: Recovery posture is serviceable, but rehearsal debt suppresses stronger action claims.

deltaGate.summary: Live updates may refresh secondary summaries, but the promoted anomaly lease remains pinned.

serviceHealth.summary: Queue stress is authoritative and remains the dominant blocker.
Supplier latency is buffered; action posture stays guarded.
Preserved proof is readable, but live rebinding is blocked pending replay alignment.
Coverage is serviceable, though debt remains visible.

cohortImpact.summary: Queue delay is concentrated in the priority referral cohort.
Supplier lag is suppressing delivery throughput.
Readiness remains stable, but rehearsal debt is visible.
